---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Rapid Tasks application
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to add.

## User Story
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Implementation Details
### Frontend Changes
- [ ] Component changes needed
- [ ] New pages/routes
- [ ] Styling updates

### Backend Changes
- [ ] API endpoints needed
- [ ] Database model changes
- [ ] New middleware/validation

## Mockups/Screenshots
If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help explain the feature.

## Priority
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Estimated Time
How long do you think this will take to implement?

## Dependencies
Does this feature depend on other features being completed first?
